allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'File: {c[\\"path\\"]}\\nComment: {c[\\"body\\"]}\\n---'\) for c in data if 'strateg' in c.get\('path',''\).lower\(\) or 'strateg' in c.get\('body',''\).lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'File: {c[\\"path\\"]}\\nLine: {c.get\(\\"line\\"\)}\\nComment: {c[\\"body\\"]}\\n---'\) for c in data]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Branch:', d['headRefName']\); [print\(c['messageHeadline']\) for c in d['commits']]")
